title: cacalia stellaris
intro: Cacalia stellaris, also known as Starflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant contains flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cacalia stellaris has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, which include soothing the stomach, reducing inflammation, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
